positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial map design. The primary subject is a whimsical arrangement of interconnected constellations forming recognizable animals (e.g., a leaping fox, a soaring owl, a graceful deer) intertwined with glowing, abstract astronomical pathways. Use deep midnight blues, vibrant teal, and metallic gold foil accents. The composition should be centered, utilizing negative space effectively, resembling vintage botanical illustrations meets modern graphic design. The style should be highly detailed line art mixed with clean, solid color fields, ensuring strong contrast against a pale background suitable for printing. Focus on clean, thick outlines and elegant symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, dirty, grainy, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, copyright, logo, signature, cartoon, photorealistic
